description: Container running as privileged + root must be flagged as high risk.

manifests.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: bad
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: ghcr.io/acme/web:latest
        securityContext:
          privileged: true
          runAsUser: 0
